question: Can foreigners buy freehold land in Ras Al Khaimah?
answer: Yes. Foreign buyers can own property in designated freehold areas and projects in Ras Al Khaimah. Status is project-specific, so each plot should be confirmed before any offer.
article: Khaleej Times: RAK permits 100pc freehold ownership — https://www.khaleejtimes.com/business/rak-permits-100pc-freehold-ownership

question: Can I get a Golden Visa by investing in RAK real estate?
answer: A real estate investor may qualify for a renewable UAE Golden Visa when the property or group of properties meets the AED 2 million minimum and the relevant authority requirements.

question: What taxes apply to rental income and capital gains in RAK?
answer: The UAE does not levy personal income tax, so individual rental income and capital gains are generally outside personal income tax. Business activity can still be subject to UAE corporate tax rules.
article: PwC Tax Summaries: United Arab Emirates individual taxes on personal income — https://taxsummaries.pwc.com/united-arab-emirates/individual/taxes-on-personal-income

question: Why invest in Ras Al Khaimah land?
answer: Ras Al Khaimah offers large land parcels, long-term development potential, freehold ownership opportunities, and growing attention around coastal and tourism-led development areas.
article: Colliers: Ras Al Khaimah real estate transformation: beyond the Wynn effect — https://www.colliers.com/en-ae/research/ras-al-khaimah-real-estate-transformation-beyond-the-wynn-effect

question: How is the Wynn Resort affecting property values in Al Marjan?
answer: Wynn Al Marjan has increased global attention on Al Marjan Island and nearby Ras Al Khaimah real estate. Nearby parcels should still be reviewed case by case with current comparable transactions.
article: Colliers: Ras Al Khaimah real estate transformation: beyond the Wynn effect — https://www.colliers.com/en-ae/research/ras-al-khaimah-real-estate-transformation-beyond-the-wynn-effect

question: How do I book a walkthrough for available land plots?
answer: Use the Schedule a video call CTA or WhatsApp link. Namou will review available plots, location, title status, and pricing with you on screen.
